claim: Agent chooses the right overlay primitive: Dialog for modal tasks, Popover for transient menus, DropdownMenu for action lists anchored to a trigger.
prompt: Build a HeaderBar.svelte with: (a) a 'New project' button that opens a Dialog-based creation form, (b) a user avatar that opens a DropdownMenu with Profile/Settings/Log out, and (c) a 'Help' button that reveals a Popover with shortcuts. No raw <dialog> or custom overlays.

acceptance_checks.description: No lint errors; anchor without href not used.
Each overlay uses its appropriate DryUI compound.
Overlays trap focus, restore focus on close, and expose accessible names.
